package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/sha512"
)

// scenario for sha512_sum_in_loop: `sha512.Sum512(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario638Positive(chunks [][]byte) uint32 {
	var total uint32
	for _, payload := range chunks {
		total += uint32(sha512.Sum512(payload)[0])
	}
	return total
}
